Technology Leader · Mumbai, India

Building Systems That
Scale & Endure

I'm a technology leader with over 15 years of experience building and managing large-scale software systems across fintech and media. From architecting digital lending platforms that onboard customers in 5 seconds, to leading a zero-loss migration of 3TB of data to AWS — I bridge complex engineering with strategic business goals. Currently serving as Tech Head at APAC Financial Services, ex-Reliance Jio, ex-IDFC First Bank.

LinkedIn FinSequr
Career Journey

Work Experience

NOW
Tech Head
APAC Financial Services Private Limited
Nov 2024 – Present

Responsible for the entire IT department — engineering teams, infrastructure, and data reporting. Sits on board committees for technology strategy and information security.

  • Cloud Migration: Led zero-loss migration of 3TB database data + 5TB files to AWS from physical data centre.
  • RBI Compliance: Manages annual audits and regulatory evidence for RBI security standards.
  • Disaster Recovery: Validated DR plan by running entire business on backup servers for a full day — zero data loss.
  • Process Overhaul: Migrated project tracking to Redmine; introduced Scrum with structured 2-week sprints.
  • New Features: Delivered quick-disbursement loan system and WhatsApp/web chatbot for customer support.
2022
Software Engineering Manager
IDFC First Bank
Mar 2022 – Nov 2024

Led a team of 10 engineers building "AcePL" — a digital lending platform enabling short-term loan onboarding in under 5 seconds.

  • Event-Driven Architecture: Non-blocking system with Java, Spring Boot & Kafka using Topic Chaining across microservices.
  • Core Banking Integration: Thought Machine smart contracts with choreography pattern on Kubernetes.
  • Global Delivery: Managed distributed teams across Poland and India, mentoring junior engineers.
2015
Senior Manager
Reliance Jio
Feb 2015 – Mar 2022

Joined as Senior Engineer, grew to Senior Manager over 7 years. Backend architect for JioTV, JioCinema, and JioMusic — apps used by hundreds of millions across India.

  • Built JioTune (caller tune) system and JioMusic Recommendation Engine.
  • CDN architecture for instant video/music delivery at national scale.
  • Led JioWorks — remote work management platform during COVID-19 pandemic.
  • Grew from solo developer to team lead managing 5 engineers.
2012
Software Engineer
Trigyn Technologies Limited
Sep 2012 – Feb 2015
  • eLearning platforms for United Nations (UNV) and WIPO using Java J2EE, JSF, Apache Tomcat.
  • Analytical dashboards and automated financial reporting with JavaScript and Google Charts.
  • Moodle LMS custom plugin development for international training requirements.
2011
Software Engineer
People Interactive Limited
Feb 2011 – Oct 2012
  • High-traffic user registration, payment gateway & matchmaking on LAMP stack.
  • Photo face recognition system using Python for profile verification.
  • IVR modules and backend performance optimisation for a massive subscriber base.
